title: Kuro’s Plan Against Kaya Is Revealed
description: On pages 15–18, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: WAAAAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: KyaA AAA AAA AAA A4!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Damn Kid...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: ruined our whole plan...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: If Captain Kuro sees this...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: He will kill every- body here!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I think they're finished now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey... His head is squashed under the ship bow!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't worry! He won't die from that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: First worry about your- self! You're bleeding!

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: Hey Buchi! Come look! Our ship's head is wrecked!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What!? Wrecked? How did that happen!?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Oh... that voice...

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: Its the ship's guards, the Nyaban Brothers!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Looks like there's still something on that ship...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Oh yeah, we still have...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: "Those two"....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Sneak

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: So it's that damn Butler from the mansion...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Where's he going so early in the morning?

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
